name: workplace-wellbeing
description: Third hand-curated fixture: 6 codes over a workplace-wellbeing narrative with several SUBTLE codable segments (a quiet autonomy statement, an understated recognition line) that a conservative model tends to skip — designed to probe recall, not just the obvious burnout lines.
transcriptContent: By Thursday I'm completely drained, I can barely focus on anything. The workload just keeps climbing and no one seems to notice how much we're carrying. What keeps me going is that my manager actually trusts me to run my own projects, I'm not micromanaged. When the director mentioned my report in the all-hands, that small thing meant a lot. Still, I've started thinking about whether I can keep doing this for another year. I don't really switch off in the evenings anymore.

goldCodings.codedText: By Thursday I'm completely drained, I can barely focus on anything
The workload just keeps climbing and no one seems to notice how much we're carrying
my manager actually trusts me to run my own projects, I'm not micromanaged
When the director mentioned my report in the all-hands, that small thing meant a lot
I've started thinking about whether I can keep doing this for another year
I don't really switch off in the evenings anymore
